title: Spring Campaign Landing Page
subtitle: Client review walkthrough focused on hierarchy, conversion cues, and brand consistency.

scenes.title: Hero composition and focal hierarchy
scenes.narrative: We tested three hero structures and selected this one because the message, product visual, and CTA read left-to-right without eye-jumps.
scenes.rationale: This layout improved first-click confidence in internal testing. The diagonal crop drives attention into the CTA instead of away from it.

hotspots.title: Primary CTA contrast
hotspots.note: Button tint moved from flat yellow to deep gold for better accessibility against the hero gradient.

hotspots.title: Headline rhythm
hotspots.note: Line break after the second word improves scan speed while keeping the brand phrase intact.

scenes.title: Feature strip and icon language
scenes.narrative: This section now reads as a clear progression of value, instead of a dense list.
scenes.rationale: We aligned icon stroke weight with the wordmark thickness and introduced larger spacing intervals to reduce noise.

hotspots.title: Icon simplification
hotspots.note: Removed inner shadow and reduced detail to preserve legibility on smaller viewports.
